vocab.meaning: một sự tương phản hoàn toàn/rõ rệt
vocab.example: There is a stark contrast between my childhood love for noisy team sports and my current preference for quiet, individual yoga.

vocab.meaning: những hoạt động theo đuổi trí tuệ
vocab.example: As I’ve matured, I’ve gravitated away from mindless play toward more demanding intellectual pursuits like chess and philosophy.
Unlike my active youth spent outdoors, my current hobbies are more aligned with a sedentary lifestyle due to my demanding office job.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên niềm hoài cổ/nhớ nhung
vocab.example: Although my interests have shifted, playing old board games still manages to evoke nostalgia for my carefree primary school years.

vocab.meaning: sự nỗ lực/gắng sức về thể chất
vocab.example: When I was young, I lived for high-intensity physical exertion, but nowadays I prefer leisure activities that are less taxing on the body.

vocab.meaning: thay đổi một cách mạnh mẽ/quyết liệt
vocab.example: My leisure preferences have been drastically altered by the advent of digital technology, moving from physical toys to virtual simulations.
Many of the activities I was obsessed with as a child turned out to be fleeting interests, whereas my passion for music has remained constant.

vocab.meaning: gu thẩm mỹ/sở thích tinh tế, phức tạp hơn
vocab.example: Adulthood has brought about more sophisticated tastes, leading me to enjoy gourmet cooking rather than the simple snacks of my youth.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (tuổi thơ)
vocab.example: The artistic activities I engaged in during my formative years laid the groundwork for my current career in graphic design.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi trong quan điểm/góc nhìn
vocab.example: A significant shift in perspective has made me value the peace of gardening over the competitive nature of childhood video games.
